programme.title: Australian Crime Stories: The Investigators
programme.desc: (M) When the body of a young woman was found dumped in an industrial area in Sydney's south in 1991, the odds were stacked against the lead investigator, Detective Mick Plotecki.

programme.title: Death By Fame
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: True Crime Show
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
programme.desc: (MA) Jamie-Lee Arrow reunites with her father, the "Skara Cannibal", to confront him over a brutal murder. She begins to face the horrific torment she suffered at his hands.

programme.title: Murder Under The Friday Night Lights
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.
